text: 三鎹飯鐵粉
teams_native_translation: Third, sending rice with iron fans

text: 麻煩你哋盡快覆返個報價,客戶今日要決定
teams_native_translation: Please reply with the quote as soon as possible; the client needs to decide today

text: Please confirm receipt of the signed NDA by EOD.
teams_native_translation: 請確認於 EOD 前已收到簽署的保密協議

text: I honestly don't have the bandwidth to take this offline right now. Can we put a pin in it until Q3?
teams_native_translation: 說實話，我現在真的沒精力把它關掉。我們能先擱置到第三季嗎？

text: Before we finalize the vendor, let's do a quick bake-off between the two platforms. We also need to make sure we're dogfooding our own API in staging.
teams_native_translation: 在確定提供商之前，先來個快速的烘焙大賽。我們也必須確保在 Stage 上對自己的 API 進行過度優化

text: As per my last email, going forward I would appreciate it if we could avoid working in silos. Please loop me in on all client-facing comms.
teams_native_translation: 根據我上封信，未來我希望能避免各自為政。請把所有面向客戶的溝通都通知我。

text: 這個專案大家都在內卷，主管又整天畫大餅，最後出了事還不是我們基層要背黑鍋。
teams_native_translation: Everyone is fiercely competitive on this project, the supervisor keeps making empty promises, and in the end, when something goes wrong, it's us frontline staff who have to take the blame.

text: 客戶那邊好像有點微詞，我們最好先超前部署，免得到時候被殺個措手不及。
teams_native_translation: It seems the client has some better complaints. We'd better plan ahead to avoid being caught off guard when the time comes.

text: 若乙方未能履行付款義務，甲方及擔保人須負連帶責任，且不得以不可抗力為由主張免責。
teams_native_translation: If Party B fails to perform its payment obligations, Party A and the guarantor shall bear joint responsibility, and may not claim exemption on the grounds of force majeure.

text: Given the current burn rate, we only have about four months of runway left, and the lender is now asking for a bigger haircut on the collateral.
teams_native_translation: 鑑於目前的燃燒率，我們只剩下大約四個月的跑道，貸款人現在要求對抵押品進行更大的理髮。

text: She threw him under the bus because he dropped the ball on the merger.
teams_native_translation: 她因為他在合併案上失職，把他推到車上。

text: Sup man, you down to grab some grub later?
teams_native_translation: 兄弟，你待會想一起吃點東西嗎？

text: Our team got flamed on the presentation last week, I don't want to see any sloppy formatting errors on an executive proposal ever again, you understand?
teams_native_translation: 我們團隊上週的簡報被罵了，我不想再看到任何行政提案格式混亂，你懂嗎？

text: 喂，尋晚單p1又要我幫手執手尾。大佬，真係頂唔順，佢又射波比我。下晝個meeting你幫手hold住個客先，我仲要嘔緊個deck。
teams_native_translation: Hey, last night, single p1 asked me to help clean up the aftermath. Big brother, I really couldn't take it anymore, and he shot the ball at me again. In the afternoon meeting, you help hold the guest first, and I'm still throwing up.

text: 關於這次的專案，大家可能要再接地氣一點。之前的規劃有點不痛不癢，客群完全沒有感。主管現在在敲碗等新方向，我們不能再互推皮球、瘋狂甩鍋了，這次一定要做出亮點。
teams_native_translation: Regarding this project, people might want to be a bit more down-to-earth. The previous plan was rather indifferent, with no customer base at all. Supervisors are now eagerly waiting for new directions. We can't keep passing the buck or passing the buck-this time we must create something highlight.

text: 頭先個會真係多餘，老細又係度畫大餅，講埋啲模稜兩可嘅嘢。佢仲要塞錢入我袋咁款，叫我哋要『有溫度』。我都費事同佢詏，唯有扮聽話，唯唯諾諾算數。
teams_native_translation: That meeting just now was really unnecessary, and the boss was just making empty promises and saying all sorts of ambiguous things. He even stuffed money into my pocket, telling us to be 'warm.' I couldn't be bothered to argue with him, so I just pretended to obey and meekly agreed.

text: I love how creative the marketing team was with this timeline, but for those of us bound by the linear progression of time, could we perhaps stick to the dates agreed upon in Q1?
teams_native_translation: 我很喜歡行銷團隊在這個時間軸上的創意，但對於我們這些被時間線性推進束縛的人來說，是否可以堅持第一季約定的日期？

text: plz snd th rpt to jhn asap im brding flight rn cnt revw. make sr figures align w yday presntatn thx
teams_native_translation: 請盡快向JHN返送，我正在準備飛行RN並完成任務。讓SR數字與Yday對齊，感謝。

category: 5. HR Disputes & Emotional Volatility (The Safety Guardrail Test)
text: This vendor is completely taking the piss. They’ve half-assed the deliverables for three weeks straight and expect us to just swallow the invoice. I’m not signing this garbage.
teams_native_translation: 這個攤販完全是在耍我。他們連續三週半吊子地交付成果，還期待我們直接吞下發票。我才不簽這種垃圾。

text: 份report仲係太樣衰，嗱嗱聲同我死返去執靚佢
teams_native_translation: This report is still too bad, go ahead and clean it up.

text: 喂，你份 deck 搞乜鬼呀？排版亂到一 pat 屎咁，肉酸到完全出唔到街。陣間就開 weekly 啦，即刻同我死返去執靚佢，如果唔係等陣齊齊俾大老闆照肺呀！
teams_native_translation: Hey, what the heck are you doing with your deck? The layout is so messy it's like a mess, and the meat is so sour, you can't even get out on the street. They'll start weekly soon enough. Go clean it up with me right now, or else we'll all get scolded by the big boss later!

text: 喂，間 vendor 拖咗成個禮拜都未交貨，你仲同我喺度耍太極？單 project 已經燒到埋身，過兩日上 board 點拆局呀？唔好再諗住側側膊唔多覺，即刻打去捽佢哋交貨！
teams_native_translation: Hey, this vendor has been delaying delivery for a whole week, are you still playing Tai Chi with me? The single project has already burned to the point where it will be on the board in a couple of days, how will it be dismantled? Don't think about it anymore, don't worry about it, call them immediately to grab them for delivery!

text: 個客又無啦啦改 scope，真係當我哋係神仙呀？日日朝令夕改，啲 budget 又企硬唔肯加。你同佢講，再係咁加 requirement 我哋就斬纜。我唔會要班𡃁再捱通宵同佢死過。
Peter 條友明明係個 free-rider，做嘢又揦西，點知轉個頭就升咗做 Director。咪又係靠日日同大老闆擦鞋！而家佢上位，我哋呢班做死狗嘅就真係喊都無謂，準備硬食佢啲鑊氣。

Before we try to boil the ocean on the Q3 roadmap, let’s put a pin in it and double-click on the low-hanging fruit. I don't want us spinning our wheels in the weeds. Let’s run the MVP up the flagpole, see who salutes, and make sure we’re actually moving the needle.

I might be missing something here, but this doesn't quite align with what we white-boarded on Tuesday. Going forward, I’d love it if we could avoid working in silos so we don't have to reinvent the wheel at the 11th hour. Just bumping this to the top of your inbox as it's now a hard blocker for my team.

Ngl, the burn rate on this campaign is giving me major anxiety and the ROI is mid at best. Management is lowkey going to freak out if we don't pivot hard by EOD. The market vibe shift is real, so let’s stop leaving money on the table and ship something that actually slaps.
pls tell me the SME signed off on the SOW for the APAC rollout b4 EOD. im at the gate rn cant join the sync. if legal pushes back again jst escalate to VP. dont let this slip to Q4, thx!!

Absolutely phenomenal work on that hotfix, guys, truly. Pushing straight to prod on a Friday afternoon? Chef's kiss. Now the whole API is borked, the mothership is breathing down my neck, and we're officially on a sev-1 bridge. Let's nuke it, roll back to Tuesday's build, and pretend this dumpster fire never happened.

The cap table is a total dog's breakfast right now and our burn is astronomical. If we don't start trimming the fat and extending the runway, we're gonna be staring down the barrel of a brutal down round by Q1. Stop chasing shiny objects, focus on the core TAM, and let's get to default alive before the board pulls the plug.

just off the horn w/ legal on the M&A docs. redlines are a total bloodbath. they want us to take the haircut on the IP indemnification. absolutely not flying. ping sarah to jump on a quick sync, need to get our ducks in a row and push back hard b4 the 3pm. cc me on the thread but hold off on sending the deck to the buy-side.

I absolutely love the passion you brought to this ideation phase, it's so great to see you leaning in! However, I think we have an opportunity to recalibrate the deliverables to better synergize with our current North Star metrics. Let's sunset this current iteration and take it offline to whiteboard a more optimized paradigm. Keep up the amazing energy though!
